register.title: Liveness check
register.subtitle: We need to verify that you're a real person.

retry.title: Biometrics not recognized
retry.subtitle: You can try biometrics again or you can do this next time you use Footprint.

unavailable.title: Biometric authentication unavailable
unavailable.subtitle: Unfortunately your device doesn't support biometric authentication.

success.title: Biometric authentication successful!
success.subtitle: We were able to verify your liveness.
